category_sources: Official docs at https://docs.testkube.io describe Testkube as a platform for creating, running, and analyzing tests across environments and clusters.
source_facts.description says Kubernetes-native framework for test definition and execution.
display_name_sources: Official docs title and branding use Testkube.
source_facts.homepage is https://testkube.io and source_facts.name is testkube.
docs_sources: Official Testkube documentation domain https://docs.testkube.io is linked from the official repository and homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/kubeshop/testkube; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official docs discuss workflows, templates, triggers, results, reporting, and CI/CD integrations.
source_facts.description identifies Kubernetes-native test definition and execution.
